description: Per-scanner path-invariance contract for http-timeout-checker — N1-class path. File `src/api/test/route.ts` uses fetch() without AbortController/timeout. http-timeout-checker scans api/lib/services directories only, so fixture lives at src/api/test/ (not src/app/api/test/). Post-v0.16.3 must flag CWE-400.
